name: U-Haul Holding Co /NV/
summary: U-Haul Holding Company, through subsidiary U-Haul International, Inc., is North America's largest do-it-yourself moving and storage operator. It rents trucks, trailers, towing devices, self-storage units, and portable U-Box moving and storage units through nearly 2,400 Company-operated retail stores and over 21,600 independent dealers. It also sells moving supplies, offers insurance through Repwest and ARCOA subsidiaries, and sells life insurance, Medicare supplement, and annuities through Oxford Life Insurance Company.
